simperiod: checkpoint sim period in ns used with BASE_CPT_* sequences

db: sqlite database file to be created or updated
nodeclamp: distribute threads evenly across specified nodes

numRings: Number of rings of neighbors to connect to each component
eventDensity: How many events to transmit per component
smallPayload: Size of small event payloads in bytes
largePayload: Size of large event payloads in bytes
largeEventFraction: [TODO] Fraction of events that are large
imbalance-factor: [TODO] Imbalance factor for thread-level distribution. Value in [0,1] (0: balanced, 1: single thread does all work)
componentSize: Size of the additional data field of the component in bytes
verbose: Whether or not to write the recvCount to file

sweeps.name: strong_scaling_1to12_ranks
sweeps.desc: sweep 1 to 12 ranks for a fixed configuration

sweeps.name: strong_scaling_1to12_threads
sweeps.desc: sweep 1 to 12 threads for a fixed configuration

sweeps.desc: sweep 13 to 40 ranks per node for a fixed configuration
